notes: Full official URLs live in this Git-tracked registry (not only in app UI).
forms_url is the official state tax forms hub from product research.
form_urls.* currently deep-link to the forms hub (or CA FTB search) unless a more specific official page is curated later.
refund_tracker_url is null when the jurisdiction has no personal income tax refund portal.
Verify periodically via Federation of Tax Administrators state forms directory.
